observed_result_policy: The embedded observed_result is the reproducible baseline only. Live model results are stored under reports/evaluation/runs and never overwrite this file.

verifiable_facts: 类型标注帮助工具发现接口错误，但不会改变运行时语义。

资源必须引用知识点 AIAPP-K001。
